sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ النَّاسُ الْأَخْبَارَ الْيَوْمِيَّةَ عَبْرَ الْمَوَاقِعِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi čitaju dnevne vijesti putem elektronskih stranica.
sentences.translationEn: People read daily news via electronic websites.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ الْحُصُولُ عَلَى الْمَعْلُومَاتِ سَرِيعًا وَسَهْلًا جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje informacija postalo je veoma brzo i lako.
sentences.translationEn: Obtaining information has become very fast and easy.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الصَّحَفِيُّ مَقَالًا مُهِمًّا عَنِ الْبِيئَةِ فِي مَوْقِعِهِ.
sentences.translation: Novinar je na svojoj stranici napisao važan članak o okolišu.
sentences.translationEn: The journalist wrote an important article about the environment on his site.
